blocks.text: Sandra Flores, with Michael Walker copied:

Thank you for the time yesterday. The briefing gave us a clean read on where you want the review focused, and it matches what the early data is telling us for {{fact:f:E-2010-001.client}}. We have the purchasing history and the first inventory extract, and Daniel Leach has started reconciling them against the freight file. Nothing in the numbers so far changes the plan we walked you through.

One request. To finish the baseline we need the inventory movement by warehouse and SKU for the last full year, and the freight invoices broken out by lane rather than by carrier. Daniel Leach can work from either cut on the freight, but the lane view is what lets us see where the expedited cost is really landing. If your logistics group at Poole, Mcknight and Rush can send both by the end of next week, we hold to schedule.

On the site visits, Michael Walker will confirm the two dates with your assistant this week and hold a half-day either side for the interviews that tend to slip. Nothing else is needed from you today; I will send the interview list on Friday with the times, so calendars can be set.
